description: Returns all skill instances registered on this module with their full configuration as a JSON-encoded array.

returns.name: all_skills_json
returns.description: JSON-encoded array of skill objects. Each object contains: id, skill_type, is_enabled, parameter_mapping, volatile_mapping, interface_mapping, local_defaults, displayname, description, tags, created_at, updated_at.

description: Returns the full configuration of a single skill instance by its unique ID.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the skill instance (e.g. 'motion_slow').

returns.name: skill_json
returns.description: JSON-encoded skill object, or empty string if not found.

description: Creates a new skill instance on this module. Fails if a skill with the given ID already exists.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique name for this skill instance (e.g. 'motion_slow'). Must be unique within the module.

params.name: skill_type
params.description: The skill type this instance belongs to (e.g. 'motion_control'). Must match a type defined in the blueprint.

params.name: parameter_mapping
params.description: JSON object mapping skill parameter names to module parameter keys. Example: {"max_speed": "drive.max_speed_mps"}.

params.name: volatile_mapping
params.description: JSON object mapping skill volatile names to module volatile keys. Example: {"current_position": "robot.pos"}.

params.name: interface_mapping
params.description: JSON object mapping skill interface names to module interface functionnames. Example: {"move_to": "drive_move_to_position"}.

params.name: local_defaults
params.description: JSON object with instance-specific default value overrides. Applied when the skill is activated. Example: {"drive.max_speed_mps": 0.5}.

params.name: displayname
params.description: Optional human-readable display name for this skill instance.

params.name: description
params.description: Optional description of this skill instance.

params.name: tags
params.description: Optional JSON array of tag strings for filtering and grouping.

returns.name: success
returns.description: Whether the skill was created successfully.

description: Updates an existing skill instance. Only provided fields are updated; unset fields remain unchanged.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the skill instance to update.

params.name: is_enabled
params.description: Whether this skill instance is active.

params.name: parameter_mapping
params.description: Updated parameter mapping as JSON object, or empty to leave unchanged.

params.name: volatile_mapping
params.description: Updated volatile mapping as JSON object, or empty to leave unchanged.

params.name: interface_mapping
params.description: Updated interface mapping as JSON object, or empty to leave unchanged.

params.name: local_defaults
params.description: Updated instance-specific defaults as JSON object, or empty to leave unchanged.

params.name: displayname
params.description: Updated display name, or empty to leave unchanged.

params.name: description
params.description: Updated description, or empty to leave unchanged.

returns.name: success
returns.description: Whether the skill was updated successfully.

description: Deletes an existing skill instance from this module by its unique ID.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the skill instance to delete.

returns.name: success
returns.description: Whether the skill was deleted successfully.
